title: cloiselia oleifolia
intro: Cloiselia oleifolia, also known as Sweet Cloiselia, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountains of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cloiselia oleifolia include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and easing respiratory problems. Cloiselia oleifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
